case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. CHRISTOPHE C RICH

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RICH, CHRISTOPHE C NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-08-2021
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66849802)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-03-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-02-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
